description_long: This is a modern, two-story urban house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of dark and light-colored surfaces, with prominent use of black and beige tones. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes a balcony with a metal railing on the first floor and a spacious rooftop terrace. A car is parked in a dedicated driveway area adjacent to the house, which is enclosed by a low fence. The main entryway is accessible via a short set of steps and is partially sheltered by an overhanging upper floor.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior surfaces. Features include a balcony, rooftop terrace, and a driveway with a parked car.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, balcony with metal railing, large windows, and the driveway with a parked car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the beige facade, prominent window frames, and the rooftop terrace with partial fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid beige wall with minimal windows and the car visible in the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black exterior, additional windows, and the car parked along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a short set of steps, partially sheltered by an overhanging upper floor, and a simple modern door.
